text:
In the first space, I feel caught between comfort and vacancy—a minimalistic, modern room, awaiting purpose, its silence almost tangible. I sense potential creativity, restrained yet pulsing beneath the surface. 

In the second space, amid the vibrant displays of R+D, curiosity stirs within me. Surrounded by words and screens exploring the interaction between humans and technology, I feel intellectually stimulated, a participant in this evolving conversation. There is energy here—an invitation to reflect on our place in the advancing world.
